aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and clear service categorization, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google Business Profile (GBP) reviews.
Expand on service pages with detailed content and relevant keywords.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted HVAC keywords for better search visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: No active Google Business Profile (GBP) was detected, which significantly impacts local search visibility.
critical_issues: No customer reviews or ratings to build trust and authority.
Missing GBP insights and analytics for performance tracking.

nap_citations.summary: Inconsistent or missing NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across the web could be hindering local search performance.
action_items: Create and verify a GBP listing with accurate NAP information.
Audit and update NAP citations on major directories like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local business directories.
Ensure NAP consistency across the website and all online platforms.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema beyond basic markup.
Missing Service schema for individual services like AC Repair, Heating Installation, etc.
No Review schema to highlight customer testimonials and ratings.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of GBP and customer reviews severely limits local search visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Gilbert, Arizona on Google Maps and local search results.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a GBP listing and generating initial customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, localized content that targets HVAC-related keywords and establishes the business as a local authority.

page_title: Agape Air: Gilbert, AZ HVAC Repair & Installation
